summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 3 backend testing for Value Bet Intelligence app. All 26 tests passed successfully (100% success rate). Tested AUTH, ANALYSIS provider chain (OpenAI gpt-4o-mini primary + Emergent fallback), SYSTEM STATUS (scheduler with 3 jobs), FALLBACK SOURCES (ESPN working, Sofascore/SportyTrader 0 as expected due to 403), FILTERS, CSV EXPORT, TIMELINE, META LEAGUES, existing endpoints, and AUTHZ. No issues found.

notes: Sofascore and SportyTrader returning 0 entries is EXPECTED behavior (datacenter IPs blocked with 403)
ESPN fallback working correctly with 36 entries
Analysis run returned 'no_value' verdict which is valid (no value bets found in current matches)
Frontend testing skipped as per testing_type: 'backend only(skip frontend)'

passed_tests: AUTH: Login with demo@valuebet.app / demo1234 returns 200 + token
SYSTEM STATUS: GET /api/system/status returns scheduler.enabled=true, 3 jobs (refresh_upcoming, refresh_live, purge_context), all providers configured
FALLBACK SOURCES: GET /api/system/fallback-sources returns ESPN=36, Sofascore=0 (expected), SportyTrader=0 (expected), valid data structure
ANALYSIS: POST /api/analysis/run with refresh:false completes in 16s, returns _provider='openai:gpt-4o-mini', verdict='no_value'
META LEAGUES: GET /api/meta/leagues returns 14 leagues alphabetically sorted
FILTERS: GET /api/picks/today/filtered works with and without query params, returns _filtered metadata
CSV EXPORT: GET /api/picks/today/export.csv returns valid CSV with correct headers and Content-Disposition attachment
CSV EXPORT: GET /api/picks/tracked/export.csv returns valid CSV with correct headers
TIMELINE: GET /api/stats/timeline returns 2 entries with all required fields (tracked_at, match_label, outcome, confidence_score, cumulative_won, cumulative_settled, win_rate)

EXISTING ENDPOINTS: /api/matches/upcoming (8 matches), /api/matches/live (20 matches), /api/picks/today, /api/picks/history (8 runs), /api/picks/tracked (2 picks), /api/stats/dashboard (100% win rate)
AUTHZ: All 8 protected endpoints (/api/system/*, /api/picks/today/filtered, /api/picks/*/export.csv, /api/stats/timeline, /api/meta/leagues, /api/matches/*) return 401 without Bearer token
